ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-31-2022 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-14-2022 Continued To Sep-20-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Prove-Up Hearing For New Barn (Notices)
Off Calendar Jun-02-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Prove-Up Hearing as to defaulted defendant New Barn, Inc.
Dept. 514. Judge: Michelle Tong. Clerk: K. Dougherty. Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:48 a.m.

Kevin P. Montee, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Roger De Lusignan, as Trustee of the De Lusignan-Cesario Trust, who was placed under oath and testified.
Both Messrs. Montee and Lusignan appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by respondent New Barn, Inc.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Promissory Note was filed on June 15, 2020, and personally served on defendant New Barn, Inc.'s Agent of Process on December 13, 2020.
Default as to defendant New Barn, Inc. was entered on January 21, 2021.
DOE defendants were dismissed on April 9, 2021.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Roger De Lusignan, as Trustee of the De Lusignan-Cesario Trust, and against the defaulted defendant New Barn, Inc., as follows:

Damages/Principal - $100,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $15,340.35.
Attorney Fees - $3,061.25.
Costs - $1,003.90.

Total - $119,405.50.

Counsel for plaintiff shall prepare the proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.

Proceedings concluded at 10:06 a.m.
